name: skinnova
description: SkinNova - Full-stack skin disease detection application

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:python"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:python"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
